title: Claude Code (Fable) V/S Codex (GPT-5.5) : MATHEMATICAL TEST = ONE CLEAR WINNER!
summary: A video analysis comparing the value of ChatGPT Plus, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, and Claude Max subscriptions against their API-equivalent costs. The analysis suggests that higher-tier subscription plans can provide thousands of dollars in usage value relative to their monthly price, though value depends on actual usage patterns and is better-suited for individuals than businesses.
writeup: AICodeKing compares the subscription value of AI coding plans against equivalent API pricing. The estimates: Claude Pro delivers roughly $400 in API-equivalent value for $20 per month, while ChatGPT Plus provides about $700 at the same price. Higher tiers shift the math further, with ChatGPT Pro at $200 monthly reaching up to $14,000 in theoretical usage value if fully utilized. The takeaway is that flat-rate subscriptions can substantially undercut metered API costs for heavy users.
